subtitles.original: 僕らよ 始まれ
subtitles.english: Let us begin

subtitles.original: 青く 青く 果てまで
subtitles.english: To the blue, blue end of the world

subtitles.original: 繭の底 目を覚ましたバースデイ
subtitles.english: Awakening at the bottom of the cocoon, my birthday

subtitles.original: ホームシックにやられそうなバス停
subtitles.english: At a bus stop where homesickness almost takes over

subtitles.original: 何処に居たって足りない
subtitles.english: No matter where I am, it's not enough

subtitles.original: 命は一つずつ足りない
subtitles.english: Our lives are not enough, one by one

subtitles.original: まだ 羽ばたくのは脳内にて 終わらないで
subtitles.english: Fluttering wings inside my mind, don't let it end yet

subtitles.original: まだ 不思議な夢を見る
subtitles.english: I still dream a strange dream

subtitles.original: 二人なら
subtitles.english: If it's the two of us...

subtitles.original: 何処までも行けると
subtitles.english: ...we can go anywhere

subtitles.original: どうしてか 信じたくなった
subtitles.english: For some reason, I wanted to believe it

subtitles.original:
跳ねる鼓動 誰を呼ぶの ベルの音 どうして待って
春夏秋冬 孵化は自分主導
subtitles.english:
My bounding pulse, who does the bell chime for?
Waiting through the seasons, the hatching is up to me!

subtitles.original:
あっという間に終わる祭りを前に
恐れさえも 笑い合おう
subtitles.english:
Faced with a festival that ends in the blink of an eye,
let's laugh off even our fears

subtitles.original: 共に在ろう
subtitles.english: Let's be together

subtitles.original: 至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた
subtitles.english: Highly incomplete, and that's why it's getting fun!

subtitles.original: 空腹の夜を越え
subtitles.english: Crossing the hungry nights...

subtitles.original: 空白に願い唱え
subtitles.english: ...chanting wishes into the void

subtitles.original: 諦め尽くされた世界を
subtitles.english: Taking over a world given up on...

subtitles.original: 君とふたり占めに転げ回る
subtitles.english: ...and tumbling around with just you

subtitles.original: 混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
subtitles.english: Blending together, as if being reborn

subtitles.original: きっと僕達だけが成せるパレード
subtitles.english: Surely, this is a parade only we can pull off

subtitles.original: 絶対証明したい 進化したい
subtitles.english: I absolutely want to prove it, I want to evolve

subtitles.original: 才能超えた新形態 さあ想像次第 「どうなりたい？」
subtitles.english:
A new form beyond talent, it's up to our imagination:
"What do you want to be?"

subtitles.original: 斯くも現実は不可能を敷き詰めだがり
subtitles.english: Even though reality wants to block us with impossibilities...

subtitles.original: 過去の惜別と睨めっこしたって憂うばかり
subtitles.english: ...and staring down past partings only brings grief

subtitles.original: 今はそこに君が居る
subtitles.english: Now, you are here by my side

subtitles.original: 未知なるバージョン
subtitles.english: An unknown version...

subtitles.original: 覚醒前夜
subtitles.english: ...on the eve of awakening

subtitles.original: まだ名も無きヒーロー
subtitles.english: A still-nameless hero

subtitles.original: 行こうか
subtitles.english: Shall we go?

subtitles.original: 僕らよ 始まれ
subtitles.english: Let us begin

subtitles.original: 青く 青く 果てまで
subtitles.english: To the blue, blue end of the world

subtitles.original: 至って不完全体 故に面白くなってきた<
subtitles.english: Highly incomplete, and that's why it's getting fun!

subtitles.original: 空腹の夜を越え
subtitles.english: Crossing the hungry nights...

subtitles.original: 空白に願い唱え
subtitles.english: ...chanting wishes into the void

subtitles.original: 諦め尽くされた世界を
subtitles.english: Taking over a world given up on...

subtitles.original: 君とふたり占めに転げ回る
subtitles.english: ...and tumbling around with just you

subtitles.original: 混ざり合い、そして生まれ変わるような
subtitles.english: Blending together, as if being reborn

subtitles.original: きっと僕達こそが成せるパレード
subtitles.english: Surely, this is a parade only we can pull off

subtitles.original: 不完全体、美しきパレード
subtitles.english: Highly incomplete, a beautiful parade

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで！
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that...

subtitles.original: ゲストの前にちょっとね、今ね
subtitles.english: Before we continue with our guest...

subtitles.original: 東北の方で地震があったみたいですが、大丈夫でしょうか？
subtitles.english: It seems there was an earthquake in Tohoku. Is everyone okay?

subtitles.original: 東北の方、身の回りの安全を優先でお願いします
subtitles.english: Everyone in Tohoku, please prioritize your safety first.

subtitles.original: 気をつけるんだよ！ / 気をつけてください！
subtitles.english: Be careful! / Please stay safe!

subtitles.original: そして！次のゲストはリオナちゃんです！
subtitles.english: And now, our next guest is Riona-chan!

subtitles.original:
はーい！Pla-Glowのリーダー、響咲リオナです！
ぷらぷら～よろし～！
subtitles.english:
Hello! I'm Hibiki Riona, the leader of Pla-Glow!
Pura-pura, nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: そして、そら先輩、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Also, Sora-senpai, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとうございます！嬉しい！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! I'm so happy!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、あの、最近めちゃくちゃ仲良いっていうのと
subtitles.english: Today, well, since we've been getting really close lately...

subtitles.original: めちゃめちゃ仲良いですしね
subtitles.english: Yeah, we're super close!

subtitles.original:
あとお歌とダンスと言えば、
なんか今はリオナちゃんってイメージがあって
subtitles.english:
And when it comes to singing and dancing,
I've really been picturing Riona-chan lately.

subtitles.original: 一緒にあの、歌いたいと思って、呼んじゃいました！
subtitles.english: I really wanted to sing with you, so I invited you!

subtitles.original: 本当に嬉しかったです！呼んでもらえた時！
subtitles.english: I was so incredibly happy when you invited me!

subtitles.original: それより、それより / はい、はい / そら先輩
subtitles.english: By the way, by the way... / Yes? / Sora-senpai...

subtitles.original: 新衣装じゃないですか！ / そう！
subtitles.english: You're wearing a new outfit, aren't you! / Yes!

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ可愛い！ / ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: It's so cute! / Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: どんな衣装なんですか？
subtitles.english: What kind of outfit is it?

subtitles.original:
こちらはですね、去年出したアルバムの「Parallel」っていう
ジャケットで使った衣装なんですけど
subtitles.english:
This is the outfit used for the cover of "Parallel",
the album I released last year.

subtitles.original: もう、実際にライブでも着たいと思って、仕立てて...
subtitles.english:
But I really wanted to wear it for an actual live concert,
so I had it made...

responses.thoughts:
**Analysis and Action Plan: Generating Synchronized Subtitles**

Okay, here's what's running through my mind. I've got a video segment, timestamps, lyrics for a Japanese song ("拍動" / Hakudo) from Tokino Sora and Hibiki Riona, and I need to generate synchronized subtitles in JSON format. The goal is to produce a tool call (`default_api:final_result`) with the properly formatted JSON for accurate subtitles.

First, I dissected the task. The initial part (0:00-0:32) is intro/transition so I can skip subtitles there. Lyrics kick in at 0:32, and the reference JSON has those lyrics. I need to make the timings precise to the millisecond. There's a section to transcribe and translate (03:42-04:59).

I carefully went through the video, noting every vocal change, beat, and visual cue to define the precise time for each subtitle. There was a discrepancy in the lyrics between the reference and what I actually heard at 0:53, so I had to confirm what's being sung. I verified the timing. Also, I checked the lyrics, made sure each of them is within the 50-character limit.

The MC/Talk section required manual transcription and translation, I listened carefully to capture the nuances. I had to double check some things: I heard the term "Pla-Glow" by Riona, which is a unit name. The timing is crucial. The album that Sora mentions is "Parallel".

I am ready to produce the `default_api:final_result` JSON string.
